subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream!

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the sights we have yet to see!

subtitles.original: もっと もっと
subtitles.english: More, more...

subtitles.original: 輝いて
subtitles.english: Shine brighter...

subtitles.original: 高く 高く
subtitles.english: Higher, higher...

subtitles.original: 飛び立とう
subtitles.english: Let's fly away!

subtitles.original: 奇跡さえも 越えて
subtitles.english: Even beyond miracles!

subtitles.original: 皆さんたくさんのコメント、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for all your comments, everyone!

subtitles.original: 一つ 一つ 重ねてきた
subtitles.english: One by one, we have built them up...

subtitles.original: 未来地図のページをめくるように
subtitles.english: ...as if turning the pages of our map of the future.

subtitles.original: 泣いて 泣いて 泣いた夜も
subtitles.english: Even the nights when I cried, cried, and cried...

subtitles.original: 大切な人生のストーリーだから
subtitles.english: ...are part of my precious life story.

subtitles.original: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream!

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ
subtitles.english: Let's go see the sights we have yet to see!

subtitles.original: 終わりのない歌を
subtitles.english: An endless song...

subtitles.original: キミに キミに キミへと 届け
subtitles.english: ...I'll deliver it to you, to you, to you!

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと
subtitles.english: Forever and ever,

subtitles.original: 誓うの 決意のソラへ
subtitles.english: I swear, to the sky of determination...

subtitles.original: 行こう
subtitles.english: ...let's go!

subtitles.original: 本当にみんなのおかげで、最高の誕生日になりました！
subtitles.english: Thanks to everyone, this has truly been the best birthday ever!

subtitles.original: みんなのこと、大好きだよー！
subtitles.english: I love you all so much!

subtitles.original: ソロライブも来てね！
subtitles.english: Please come to my solo live too!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ときのそら お披露目誕生日2026
subtitles.english: Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026

subtitles.original: 告知あり
subtitles.english: [Announcement Inside]

responses.thoughts:
**Final Thoughts on Subtitling "Ketsui no Sora e"**

Alright, let's break this down. My primary goal here is to get accurate subtitles for Tokino Sora's "Ketsui no Sora e" performance from the "#ときのそらお披露目誕生日2026" video. My thinking is, I need to capture both the lyrics and any spoken dialogue, making sure the timecodes are spot-on. I'm aiming for both transcription and translation, paying close attention to nuances in Japanese.

First, I watched the segment from 00:00 to 02:46.

*   **Transcription and Translation:** I meticulously listened and began to transcribe the opening lyrics from 00:00.000 to 00:05.100 as "夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ," translating to "I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream." I then moved to the next segment, carefully timing the phrases and translating them, noting any sustained notes.

*   **Dialogue Interludes:** I kept a sharp ear out for any dialogue. For instance, at 00:41.000, Sora's words, "皆さんたくさんのコメント、ありがとうございます！" needed to be translated as "Thank you so much for all your comments, everyone!" I followed this pattern throughout, ensuring the translations were accurate and natural.

*   **The "Solo Live" Conundrum:** The most challenging part was understanding and translating the phrase around 01:53.300. Sora says "アプライブも来てね！" At first, I was confused and had to listen to it closely, trying to decipher it based on her concerts. After much deliberation and multiple listens, I concluded that it was "ソロライブも来てね！" or "Please come to my solo live too!"

*   **Final Details:** At the end, I noted the screen text from 02:00 onwards. I made sure to include the "Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026" with the note "Announcement Inside".

Here’s the complete list:

```
00:00.000 -> 00:05.100 og: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ en: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream.
00:05.100 -> 00:10.500 og: まだ見ぬ景色を 見に行こうよ en: Let's go see the sights we have yet to see!
00:11.700 -> 00:13.600 og: もっと もっと en: More, more...
00:16.100 -> 00:18.500 og: 輝いて en: Shine brighter...
00:20.500 -> 00:22.900 og: 高く 高く en: Higher, higher...
00:25.100 -> 00:28.000 og: 飛び立とう en: Let's fly away!
00:28.000 -> 00:32.400 og: 奇跡さえも 越えて en: Even beyond miracles!
00:41.000 -> 00:45.300 og: 皆さんたくさんのコメント、ありがとうございます！ en: Thank you so much for all your comments, everyone!
00:54.000 -> 01:00.000 og: 一つ 一つ 重ねてきた en: One by one, we have built them up...
01:00.000 -> 01:05.300 og: 未来地図のページをめくるように en: ...as if turning the pages of our map of the future.
01:05.900 -> 01:09.900 og: 泣いて 泣いて 泣いた夜も en: Even the nights when I cried, cried, and cried...
01:09.900 -> 01:14.900 og: 大切な人生のストーリーだから en: ...are part of my precious life story.
01:14.900 -> 01:20.100 og: 夢を 夢で 終わらせたくないんだ en: I don't want to let my dream end as just a dream.
